gradient.$description: Arctic light-mode gradient tokens. Primary and accent gradients are identical to dark mode; surface gradients use opaque pastel tints for visibility on bright white surfaces.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — same as dark: ice blue to glacier cyan.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — same as dark: glacier cyan to teal.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — opaque ice-blue pastel to glacier-cyan pastel. Visible and harmonious on white surfaces.

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary — ice-blue spectrum for primary-accented containers.

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent — cyan spectrum for accent-accented containers.
